title: Antisolar Blocks
description: Early access to my building mod ! It adds over 700 blocks already and more is to come. Focused on new rocks and plants this building mod is meant to fit in with vanilla while sprucing up the limited minecraft palette.
body:
![Title: Antisolar Mod Early Access](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14ae470f1023fb6152832b83c1f4bcaa2b549815.png)
Adds 751 new blocks filling out holes in the current minecraft palette

- About 60 new rocks / minerals
- A couple silly plushies
- 50+ new flowers and plants
- A few new items and blocks for crafting recipes

All textures are original instead of recolors of vanilla textures

A few texture were made by my friends Shep, Potassium and Owl

I tried to make it as original as I could and I hope you enjoy it !

Join the discord to give feedback and ideas for future additions [https://discord.gg/tXFSezswHQ](https://discord.gg/tXFSezswHQ)

The early access is only meant to be played in creative as most blocks are not available in survival yet
